description: A designed graphic over a black-and-white photo of handcuffed hands. Light blue capitals read 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with '1/28/2025 | Detroit, MI & Cincinnati, OH' beneath. Large white text reads 'Honduran National', then 'CRIMES:' and a bullet 'Firearm possession'. An ICE logo is at lower left and a red diagonal banner at lower right reads 'DETROIT & CINCINNATI'.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/28/2025 Detroit, MI & Cincinnati, OH; Honduran National; CRIMES: Firearm possession; ICE; DETROIT & CINCINNATI
